title: Revision of Reporting Requirements under the Measures to Prevent Thai Baht Speculation
text:
Unofficial Translation
This translation is for the convenience of those unfamiliar with the Thai language.
Please refer to the Thai text for the official version.
1 September 2025 (B.E. 2568)
To Manager
All Commercial Banks
The Export and Import Bank of Thailand
The Islamic Bank of Thailand
The Government Savings Bank
The Small and Medium Enterprise Development Bank of Thailand
The Bank of Agriculture and Agricultural Cooperatives
All Finance Companies
No. BOT.C. 5495/2568 Re: Revision of Reporting Requirements under the Measures
to Prevent Thai Baht Speculation
In pursuance to the Bank of Thailand (BOT)’s circular No. BOT.C. 5491/2568
Re: Revision of Rules and Practices under the Measures to Prevent Thai Baht Speculation dated
1 September 2025 (Rules and Practices) revising the rules and practices related to Thai baht
transactions with Non-residents (NRs) which include the requirements for financial institutions to
report the transactions conducted with NRs in the forms and procedures as prescribed by the
BOT, the BOT has updated the reporting manuals accordingly.
The financial institutions are required to report the transactions conducted with
NRs in accordance with the Rules and Practices via DAP (Data Acquisition and Publication) with
reference to the following reporting manuals.
1) Data File Document for the Measures to Prevent Thai Baht Speculation (Data
File Document Version 2025.01)
2) Data File Manual for the Measures to Prevent Thai Baht Speculation (Data File
Manual Version 2025.01)
3) Validation Worksheet version 3.1
4) R02 Dataset Document Version 1.0
5) R02 Dataset Manual Version 2025.01
6) R02 Classification Document Version 2025.01
7) Report templates for NRB end-of-day outstanding balances exceeding the
specified limit (R02).
Details of the above document and dataset schema are provided on the BOT website
(www.bot.or.th) under the section of Our Services/ Data Acquisition and Publication/ Report

2
Templates and Document for Financial Markets Data/ Non-residents’ Lending or Borrowing
Transactions and others (Thai version).
The DMS Classification Document is also provided on the BOT Website
(www.bot.or.th) under the section of Our Services/ Data Acquisition and Publication/ Report
Templates and Document for Financial Institutions Data/ Financial Institutions Data (Thai version).
The above reporting requirements are effective from 1 December 2025.
Yours sincerely,
(Ms. Pimpan Charoenkwan)
Assistant Governor, Financial Markets Operations Group
for Governor
Foreign Exchange Administration and Policy Department
Tel. 0-2283-6714, 0-2283-5326-7, 0-2283-5426, 0-2356-7639
status: Revision of Reporting Requirements under the Measures to Prevent Thai Baht Speculation
